CustomField.formula: AND( HOMEtracker__Property__c !="", !CONTAINS(Name, "Test"), OR( AND( HOMEtracker__Application_Complete_Date__c >= DATE( 2015,6,1), NOT(ISBLANK(Date_Invoiced__c))), AND( Assistance_Complete_Date__c >=DATE( 2015,6,1), NOT(ISBLANK(Date_Assistance_Invoiced__c))), AND( HOMEtracker__Close_Date__c >=DATE( 2015,6,1), NOT(ISBLANK(Date_Closing_Invoiced__c))), AND( Date_Application_Terminated_Withdrawn__c >=DATE(2015,6,1),NOT(ISBLANK(Date_Invoice_Processed__c))) ) )
CustomField.label: Show on AA Invoiced CALC
